comments.body:
﻿Dogfood closeout for run15:

- Proof artifacts are under `proof/dogfood/2026-05-28/run15/`.
- CI and CodeQL are green on #542.
- Automated review generated no comments; review thread sweep returned `totalCount: 0`.
- Guard behavior observed: demo emitted `guard.budget_warning`, `guard.budget_exceeded`, `guard.loop_detected`, and `guard.retry_limit_exceeded`; review-loop emitted `guard.budget_exceeded` at `$0.0510 > $0.0450` and `guard.retry_limit_exceeded` for `apply_patch` attempt 4.
- Local validation: focused pytest passed (`30 passed in 1.37s`), `python scripts/sdk_release_guard.py --check-mcp-npm` passed, artifact JSON/JSONL parsing passed, local path scan passed, and `git diff --check` was clean.
- Distribution check: GitHub release/PyPI SDK remain `1.2.10`, npm MCP remains `0.2.2`, Glama still returns `tools: []`, and the direct MCP Registry server endpoint returned 404.

Blocked only by required human review.

Dogfood closeout for run16:

- Proof artifacts are under `proof/dogfood/2026-05-28/run16/` at commit `e7d9385`.
- CI and CodeQL are green on #542 after the run16 push.
- Review-thread sweep returned `totalCount: 0`; no actionable automated review comments appeared after the wait.
- Guard behavior observed: repo-local demo emitted `guard.budget_warning`, `guard.budget_exceeded` at `$1.0800 > $1.0000`, `guard.loop_detected`, and `guard.retry_limit_exceeded`; review-loop emitted `guard.budget_exceeded` at `$0.0510 > $0.0450` and `guard.retry_limit_exceeded` for `apply_patch` attempt 4.
- Local validation: focused pytest passed (`30 passed in 1.39s`), `python scripts/sdk_release_guard.py --check-mcp-npm` passed, artifact JSON/JSONL parsing plus UTF-8/BOM/NUL/local-path hygiene passed for 28 files, and `git diff --check` was clean.
- Distribution check: GitHub release/PyPI/local SDK remain `1.2.10`, npm/local MCP remain `0.2.2`, Glama still reports `0` tools, and the direct MCP Registry server endpoint returned 404.

Blocked only by required human review.

reviews.body:
## Pull request overview

Adds a trace-backed “dogfood” proof bundle for the 2026-05-28 run15 execution, capturing raw traces plus rendered report/incident outputs to document real guard enforcement behavior in the SDK’s local-first workflow.

**Changes:**
- Added a run summary describing repo state, commands executed, and observed guard events.
- Added raw trace artifacts (`*.jsonl`) for `doctor`, `demo`, and the coding-agent review-loop proof.
- Added derived artifacts: parsed guard-event extraction, CLI outputs, JSON report summaries, and incident reports (Markdown + JSON).

### Reviewed changes

Copilot reviewed 14 out of 14 changed files in this pull request and generated no comments.

<details>
<summary>Show a summary per file</summary>

| File | Description |
| ---- | ----------- |
| proof/dogfood/2026-05-28/run15/summary.md | Narrative summary tying commands to trace-backed guard events and results. |
| proof/dogfood/2026-05-28/run15/command-status.txt | Captures command sequence, exit codes, timing, and import binding used for the proof run. |
| proof/dogfood/2026-05-28/run15/import-binding.txt | Records the resolved SDK import path and version to prove active-checkout binding. |
| proof/dogfood/2026-05-28/run15/doctor.out.txt | Raw `agentguard doctor` output for the run. |
| proof/dogfood/2026-05-28/run15/demo.out.txt | Raw `agentguard demo` output for the run. |
| proof/dogfood/2026-05-28/run15/coding_agent_review_loop.out.txt | Raw output from the review-loop proof script run. |
| proof/dogfood/2026-05-28/run15/agentguard_doctor_trace.jsonl | Raw trace JSONL emitted by `doctor`. |
| proof/dogfood/2026-05-28/run15/agentguard_demo_traces.jsonl | Raw trace JSONL emitted by `demo`. |
| proof/dogfood/2026-05-28/run15/coding_agent_review_loop_traces.jsonl | Raw trace JSONL emitted by the coding-agent review-loop proof. |
| proof/dogfood/2026-05-28/run15/guard_events.json | Extracted guard-event payloads from the trace files for quick inspection. |
| proof/dogfood/2026-05-28/run15/demo_report.json | `agentguard report --json` output for the demo trace. |
| proof/dogfood/2026-05-28/run15/review_loop_report.json | `agentguard report --json` output for the review-loop trace. |
| proof/dogfood/2026-05-28/run15/review_loop_incident.md | Rendered incident report (markdown) for the review-loop trace. |
| proof/dogfood/2026-05-28/run15/review_loop_incident.json | Rendered incident report (json) for the review-loop trace. |
</details>
